item.title: Download Topaz Photo Pro 1.4.0
item.description: What is Topaz Photo AI? Topaz Photo AI is a professional software that automatically adjusts for your image quality needs. Simply import images into Topaz Photo AI and it will use specially trained AI models to first detect unique details, clarity, and resolution issues before applying the intelligently adjusts to maximize your image quality. item.description: ON1 Photo RAW MAX 2024 is powerful photo editing software that provides photographers with many tools and features to enhance and edit their images. With a user-friendly interface, it offers advanced editing capabilities, including non-destructive editing, AI-powered adjustments, and precise control over color and tone. item.title: Download Argente System Repair 1.0.6.1
item.description: Argente System Repair is a lightweight utility designed to diagnose and fix common Windows system problems. It scans your system to identify errors in operating system components, file systems, installation files, and other system components, and then applies targeted fixes to resolve these problems. The tool provides different scan modes, including simple scan, recommended scan, and custom scan, allowing users to customize the repair process according to their needs. System Repair...

item.title: Download Mixxx 2.5.6
item.description: Mixxx is free and open source DJ software designed for both professional and amateur DJs. It runs on multiple platforms, including Windows, macOS, and Linux. Mixxx allows DJs to mix and control audio tracks in real time, offering a wide range of features like beatmatching, crossfading, looping, EQ, effects, and more. With Mixxx, DJs can import audio files in a variety of formats, including MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, and AAC, and organize them into playlists. The software also supports...

item.title: Download Firewall Easy 0.9
item.description: Firewall Easy is an open source application that allows you to block internet access to other applications using Windows Firewall. Firewall Easy can be used to right click on a target program to block its internet access. You can also import/export rules from the Firewall Easy interface and manually add internet blockers. A simple but valuable tool to deny internet access to target apps etc. Features of Firewall Easy Easy to block apps by right clicking on the icon. Firewall Easy...

item.title: Download WinScript 2.1.4
item.description: WinScript is an open source tool built to help you build custom scripts for Windows 10 and 11. It includes scripts for debugging, privacy, performance, and more, along with the ability to install all your favorite apps with just one click. Features Debloat: Remove Windows bloatware, CoPilot, Edge, OneDrive, and other pre-installed features preset. Privacy: Disable Windows and 3rd party data collection, tracking, app access, and telemetry. Performance: Set background services to...
